author: Kklh
content: Plan: Convert single crate to workspace. Create crossbridge-protocol with sync framing helpers (read_message_sync/write_message_sync), 16 MiB cap, postcard, ClientRequest/ServerResponse types. Create crossbridge-client (binary) with peers/submit/answer subcommands. Slug derivation: prefer jj if .jj/ exists else git remote get-url origin. DB access via crosslink::db::Database. Tests: in-process server using a thread + UnixListener for socket-level integration tests; unit tests for slug parsing and label extraction.
